zh.title: 个人简介
zh.description: SDE，操作系统内核与嵌入式开发。

jobs.title: 软件工程师
achievements: 领导 Linux 嵌入式系统内核模块开发
优化内存管理算法，启动时间减少 30%
与跨职能团队协作进行系统架构设计

jobs.title: 初级软件工程师
achievements: 开发 ARM 微控制器设备驱动程序
在自定义 RTOS 中实现实时任务调度
维护和调试现有固件代码库

degrees.thesis: 论文："资源受限环境中的高效内存管理"

items.name: 项目名称 1
items.description: 开发了用于与自定义硬件外设接口的内核模块。实现了中断处理和 DMA 传输机制。

items.name: 项目名称 2
items.description: 为 ARM Cortex-M4 从零构建轻量级 RTOS。功能包括任务调度、信号量同步和内存保护。

items.name: 项目名称 3
items.description: 为分布式嵌入式系统创建了监控框架。实现了实时数据收集和远程遥测。

en.title: Personal Profile
en.description: SDE, OS Kernel and Embedded Development.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
achievements: Led development of kernel modules for Linux-based embedded systems
Optimized memory management algorithms, reducing boot time by 30%
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on system architecture design

jobs.title: Junior Software Engineer
achievements: Developed device drivers for ARM-based microcontrollers
Implemented real-time task scheduling in custom RTOS
Maintained and debugged existing firmware codebase

degrees.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
degrees.thesis: Thesis: "Efficient Memory Management in Resource-Constrained Environments"

degrees.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

items.name: Project Name 1
items.description: Developed a kernel module for interfacing with custom hardware peripherals. Implemented interrupt handling and DMA transfer mechanisms.

items.name: Project Name 2
items.description: Built a lightweight RTOS from scratch for ARM Cortex-M4. Features include task scheduling, semaphore synchronization, and memory protection.

items.name: Project Name 3
items.description: Created a monitoring framework for distributed embedded systems. Implemented real-time data collection and remote telemetry.
